creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Leo Vandewoestijne from comment #8)
> And so I start to wonder wether it isn't smarter to simply make
> knot-resolver depend on knot3, and get rid of the knot3-lib port.

> Then for users who insists not wanting the daemon I theoretically
> could simply add post-install rm commands, which would make my life
> and everybody elses a lot easier.

But wait...

What if you simply make knot3 which includes BOTH server && client
providing options to install either, or both. Isn't that a simpler
and a more elegant alternative? :)

Thanks!

--Chris
